business_model_summary.draft: Salesforce is a cloud software company that sells subscription and support, professional services, and related enterprise applications across sales, service, marketing, commerce, data, integration, and analytics workflows.
business_model_summary.excerpt_or_summary: The business description identifies Salesforce as an enterprise cloud software provider with subscription-heavy customer relationship management and related platform offerings.

revenue_driver_summary.draft: Revenue is driven by subscription seats, cloud adoption, customer retention, multi-cloud expansion, data and AI attach, professional services, and pricing discipline; the underwriting question is whether durable growth can coexist with high SaaS margins.
revenue_driver_summary.source_label: Salesforce FY2026 Form 10-K revenue and MD&A discussion
revenue_driver_summary.excerpt_or_summary: The filing links revenue to subscription and support contracts, renewals, new business, product adoption, and services activity.

customer_end_market_summary.draft: End markets are enterprises and organizations using cloud software to manage customer data, sales automation, customer service, marketing, commerce, analytics, integration, and workflow automation.
customer_end_market_summary.source_label: Salesforce FY2026 Form 10-K products and customer discussion
customer_end_market_summary.excerpt_or_summary: The filing describes customers across industries using Salesforce cloud applications and platform services.

business_understanding_risk.draft: The early gate should focus on whether a Senior is comfortable underwriting SaaS renewal durability, platform competition, AI monetization, acquisition integration, and stock-based compensation while treating non-reported inventory as expected for a cloud software issuer.
business_understanding_risk.excerpt_or_summary: Risk factors emphasize competition, renewal and expansion risk, enterprise IT spending, data security, AI and technology shifts, acquisition integration, and personnel costs.
